spec_match.rationale: The lab now validates the current handshake: destination migrate_from, old-origin web-app-origin-association allow_migration, optional migrate_to, behavior, and redirect-safe install_url.

interactive.rationale: Chrome DevTools MCP on Chrome 148 exercised every preset and each one updated status, checklist rows, pressed state, and generated JSON through the page controls.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature index card and page lede both describe the same migrate_from, allow_migration, migrate_to, and install_url handshake the lab renders.

edge_cases.rationale: The presets cover missing authorization, HTTP old origin, cross-site move, same-origin no-op, path/query inputs, malformed URL, invalid behavior, and missing install_url for redirected old routes.

references.rationale: The page cites the ChromeStatus feature, the WICG manifest-incubations sections, and the Chrome for Developers migration article.

design_system.rationale: Static scan found no raw hex colors, inline style attributes, inline event handlers, or stale migration field names; runtime verification reported zero style attributes.

summary: Repaired and rechecked with chrome-devtools-mcp on Chrome 148. Tested the default valid case plus no allow_migration, HTTP old origin, cross-site, same-origin, path/query, malformed URL, and invalid behavior/missing install_url cases; console and network stayed clean, and the feature conformance route reported 7 pass / 0 fail.
